name: kattaqurgon-bozori
description: Kattaqo'rg'on Bozori - Professional Telegram Marketplace Platform

scripts.deploy:all: npm run build:client && npm run build:admin && npm run start:server
scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../admin-panel && npm install
scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd ../admin-panel && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd client && npm run typecheck && cd ../admin-panel && npm run typecheck
